# MaiMemo Daily Story — 2026-07-05

> [!info] 📊 Today's Review Summary
> - **Studied**: 7 words | **Time**: 5 min | 7/7 词
> - 🗑️ **Forgot**: 2 words — **pomposity, vicious**
> - 🌀 **Vague**: 3 words — **blatant, defiance, connoisseur**

## Part 1: A Night of **Pomposity** 🗑️ and **Grandiloquence**

The gala was an orgy of **pomposity** 🗑️. Every guest seemed determined to outdo the next with torrents of grandiloquence. I found it all unbearable. As a self-professed **connoisseur** of fine events, I could tell the champagne was mediocre.

The host, a **cantankerous** old billionaire with a reputation for **vicious** 🗑️ business tactics, took the stage. His opening remarks were a platitude-ridden affair.

> [!quote]- 中文翻译
> 这场盛会简直是一场**自负**的狂欢。每位宾客都争先恐后地吐出滔滔不绝的豪言壮语。
> 那位脾气**暴躁**的老亿万富翁——以**恶毒**的商业手段闻名——走上舞台。

> [!note]- 📖 Word Notes
> **pomposity** 🗑️ /pɒmˈpɒsəti/
> - **Meaning**: 自负，傲慢，摆架子
> - **Usage note**: Formal/derogatory.
> - **Example**: The professor's pomposity alienated even his most devoted students.
> - **Memory tip**: Think of "pomp" + "osity"

> **grandiloquence** /ɡrænˈdɪləkwəns/
> - **Meaning**: 夸张的言辞，豪言壮语
> - **Example**: The candidate's grandiloquence failed to mask his lack of substance.

> **connoisseur** /ˌkɒnəˈsɜːr/
> - **Meaning**: 鉴赏家，行家
> - **Confusable**: connoisseur vs specialist
> - **Memory tip**: Con- + naissance = someone "with knowledge"

> **vicious** 🗑️ /ˈvɪʃəs/
> - **Meaning**: 恶毒的，凶残的
> - **Collocation**: vicious cycle, vicious attack
